seo.metaTitle: Channel as a Service for Service Providers | White-Label Sales | Hostopia
seo.metaDescription: Stand up a fully managed, white-label sales channel for your digital services. Hostopia runs inbound and outbound sales in your brand with full activity tracking.

hero.headline: A Sales Team That Sells in Your Name
hero.subheadline: Hostopia builds and operates a dedicated sales channel for your digital services — fully white-labeled, fully tracked, and aligned with your revenue goals.

howItWorks.heading: Your Channel. Our People. Your Brand.
howItWorks.intro: We recruit, train, and manage sales consultants who work exclusively on your digital services — under your brand, following your processes, and selling to your customers.

cards.title: Inbound Sales
cards.body: A dedicated team that handles inquiries, qualifies leads, and converts interest into revenue — trained on your products, your brand, and your customer base.

cards.title: Outbound Sales
cards.body: Proactive engagement with your SMB customers through targeted upsell, cross-sell, and re-engagement campaigns designed around your goals and pricing.

cards.title: Full Tracking and Reporting
cards.body: Every call, conversion, and touchpoint is tracked. You get full visibility into pipeline activity, conversion rates, and revenue generated.

cards.title: White-Label Execution
cards.body: Your customers never know we're involved. Our agents answer in your brand, use your scripts, and follow your escalation paths.

differentiators.heading: Built for Service Providers, Not Generic Call Centers

items.title: Industry Knowledge
items.body: Our teams understand the telco landscape, common objections, and what motivates SMBs to buy.

items.title: Your Systems, Your Processes
items.body: We integrate with your CRM, ticketing, and reporting systems.

items.title: Flexible Models
items.body: Campaign-based, ongoing, or seasonal. Scale up or back as needed.

items.title: Retention and Upsell Built In
items.body: Every interaction is an opportunity to grow revenue, not just close a ticket.

cta.headline: Ready to Build Your Channel?
cta.body: Hostopia can have a branded sales channel generating pipeline in weeks. Talk to our team about how Channel as a Service fits your goals.
